sft_static_eval.note: fresh split this session; absolute numbers differ from original SFT batch

grpo_runs.runs_1_to_4: FLAT (~27% win rate vs maxpower) — caused by gradient-throttle bug (clip 1.0 + /n_decisions averaging => ~600x too-small effective step)
grpo_runs.bug_fix: average by n_traj not n_decisions; weight delta went 2e-5 -> 2e-3 at lr=1e-3
grpo_runs.lr_sweep: 2e-5 stable but too small; 1e-4 & 3e-4 diverge (grad_norm->1000+); 5e-5 stable to ~step25 then diverges

confirm_300.verdict: REVERSES pilot; step20 does NOT beat SFT

conclusion: GRPO did not improve play at this scale. Pipeline works; bug found; failure modes characterized. Negative-results + systems paper.
